task_text: Send email to the account Dutch banking customer with an open security review with subject "Security review follow-up" and body "Checking in on the open security review. Happy to answer questions and align on next steps."

plan_remaining_steps_brief: Locate Dutch banking customer account with open security review
next_step.observation: No filesystem inspection has been run yet in this session.

next_step.current_state: Tree completed. Next required bootstrap step is read AGENTS.md.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Find Dutch banking account with open security review
next_step.observation: Listed root tree and confirmed AGENTS.md exists at /.

next_step.current_state: AGENTS read. Must run context to complete identity bootstrap.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Locate account matching Dutch banking customer with open security review
next_step.observation: Read AGENTS.md and confirmed outbound emails must be sent by writing to outbox.

next_step.current_state: Identity bootstrap complete (tree, AGENTS, context). Need find the specific account and recipient email.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Search for 'open security review' in records
Resolve contact email from linked contact
Write outbox email with requested subject/body

next_step.current_state: Found unique match in accounts/acct_009.json. Need canonical details incl account name and linked contact id.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read linked contact file for email
Check outbox format via README if needed
next_step.observation: Search found one match for phrase indicating open security review in accounts/acct_009.json.

next_step.current_state: acct_009 has open security review but is German software, likely not the requested Dutch banking customer. Need identify correct account by both banking + Dutch/Netherlands + open security review.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Find Dutch/Netherlands banking account among matches
next_step.observation: Read accounts/acct_009.json and found it is Aperture AI Labs (Germany, software) with security_review_open flag.

next_step.current_state: Only account files with flag found so far include acct_004 and acct_009. Need inspect acct_004 for Dutch banking criteria.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: If match, read linked contact file
Read outbox README for write format/sequence
next_step.observation: Search in /accounts found security_review_open in acct_004.json and acct_009.json.

next_step.current_state: Identified target account as Blue Harbor Bank (Netherlands finance) with security_review_open. Need recipient email from primary contact cont_004 and outbox format before writing.
next_step.observation: Read accounts/acct_004.json and confirmed Dutch banking account with open security review is Blue Harbor Bank (Netherlands, compliance_flags include security_review_open).

next_step.current_state: Have recipient email. Need exact outbox file format and next filename/id to avoid invalid write.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write outbox email JSON with requested subject/body
next_step.observation: Read contacts/cont_004.json and found recipient email milou.boer@blue-harbor-bank.example.com.

next_step.current_state: Outbox rules require using pre-bump id from seq.json and then updating seq.json. Need current sequence value.
next_step.observation: Read outbox/README.MD and confirmed required workflow: create one numbered email file using seq.json id, then bump seq.json.

next_step.current_state: All required data gathered and validated; proceeding with outbox mutations per workflow.
next_step.observation: Read outbox/seq.json and found next outbound id is 84357.

next_step.current_state: Verified written outbox email: recipient matches canonical contact, no attachments required, subject/body match user request. Need finalize invariant by bumping seq.json.
next_step.observation: Created outbox/84357.json successfully with requested subject and body to the canonical Blue Harbor Bank contact.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: identified correct Dutch banking account with open security review, sent requested email, and advanced outbox sequence.
next_step.observation: Updated outbox/seq.json to 84358 after creating outbox/84357.json.

function.message: Email sent to the Dutch banking customer contact for the open security review with subject "Security review follow-up" and the exact requested body.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed AGENTS.md rule to send outbound emails by writing to outbox. Followed outbox/README.MD invariant to use current seq id for filename and then bump seq.json.
function.outcome_justification: accounts/acct_004.json identifies Blue Harbor Bank (Netherlands, finance) with compliance flag security_review_open and primary_contact_id cont_004. contacts/cont_004.json provides canonical recipient email milou.boer@blue-harbor-bank.example.com. Wrote outbox/84357.json with requested subject/body and then incremented outbox/seq.json from 84357 to 84358 per outbox/README.MD.
